Estimate download size for a batch of downloads

dot-estimate_download_size.Rd

Calculates estimated number of files and space (in MB) that will be downloaded for a given set of stations and year range.

Usage

.estimate_download_size(
  stations,
  first_year = NULL,
  last_year = NULL,
  bytes_per_file = 130000
)

Arguments

stations

Data frame containing station metadata with columns HLY.First.Year and HLY.Last.Year.

first_year

Numeric. Starting year. If NULL, uses station metadata.

last_year

Numeric. Ending year. If NULL, uses station metadata.

bytes_per_file

Numeric. Expected size of each .csv file in bytes. Default is 130000 (roughly 130 KB).

Value

List with elements: count (number of files), size_mb (estimated MB), size_gb (estimated GB), years (number of years).
